reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
산책 시작하면서 풉백 필요해서 구매했어요. 비숑을 키우다보니 비숑모양이 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋ비숑 두마리랑 산책하는 기분? ㅎㅎ 배변봉투도 잘 들어가고 안에
파우치처럼 공간이 나누어져 있어서 간식통 작은거 넣어서 가지고 나가면 딱이에요! 단점은 부피랑 무게가 조금 있어서 리드줄에 다니까 살짝 무겁게 느껴졌어요!
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I needed a poop bag holder when starting walks. Since I have a Bichon, the Bichon-shaped design is so cute ㅋㅋㅋ It feels like I'm walking with two Bichons? ㅎㅎ The poop bags fit perfectly, and the inside is divided into compartments like a pouch, so it's perfect for carrying small treat containers on walks! The downside is that it has a bit of bulk and weight, so it felt slightly heavy hanging from the leash.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
예쁜 상품 보내주셔서 감사합니다
저희 강아지랑 똑닮은 바잇미 풉백 파우치 
정말 너무 마음에 들고 실용성도 좋습니다
가벼운 무게만큼 소지하기도 편하네요
reviews.content_en: Thank you for sending such a pretty product 💕 A BITE ME poop bag pouch that looks just like our puppy—I really love it so much, and it's very practical too. It's light and convenient to carry around.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
넘 귀여워요 똥츄가 이렇게 이쁠수 있다니
기능적인 면에서도 넘 좋아요
파우치 안에 수납도 충분하고 구멍이 있어서
비닐을 밖으로 빼서 사용하기도 좋아요
사진보다 실물이 훨씬 귀엽답니다^^
똥츄가 뿐만 아니라 백참으로도 활용하기도 좋아요
푸들이랑 고민했는데 저희 강아지랑 모색이 어울리는 흰색으로 하길 잘한거 같아요
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! I can't believe a poop bag holder can look this cute 😆 It's also amazing functionally. There's plenty of storage inside the pouch, and there's an opening so you can pull the bag out easily. The real product is so much cuter than the photos ^^ It's great not just as a poop bag holder but also as a regular pouch! I was torn between a Poodle design and this one, but I'm glad I chose the white color to match my dog's coat.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
울 강아지가 푸들이라 전에 푸들풉백을 샀었는데 
브라운 컬러가 좀 아쉬웠고 하단부분 아일렛이
빠져 버렸는 데 그냥 쓰다가 이번에 화이트를 주문했어요.
크림푸들인 울 구름이랑 똑같아서 보고 있는데
기분이가 넘 좋네요…귀여워 두금…!!!
배송 받고 세일금액이 더 낮아져서 좀 속상하네요^^
reviews.content_en: My dog is a Poodle, so I bought a Poodle poop bag holder before, but the brown color was a bit disappointing and the eyelet at the bottom fell off. I've been using it as-is, but this time I ordered the white one. It matches my cream Poodle, Gureum, perfectly, and just looking at it makes me so happy... so cute 😍!!! I'm a bit disappointed that the sale price went down after I received it ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
풉뱍파우치 종류가 다양해서 딱딱한
플라스틱재질로 사야하나 아님 헝겊으로 사야하나 고민하다가 ㅎㅎ 울집 강아지는 플라스틱만 보면멍멍짖어 비숑헝겊으로 초이스하게 되었어요 근데 왜케 귀여워요 가볍고 비닐도 쏙 들어가고 파우치안에 주머니 분리가 되어 너무 편리해요 카드도 쏙 립스틱도 쏙들어갈것같아요 무엇보다 넘 귀엽고 예뻐요👍👍👍
reviews.content_en: There are so many types of poop bag pouches, and I was wondering whether to get the hard plastic kind or the fabric one ㅎㅎ My dog barks at the sight of plastic, so I ended up choosing the Bichon fabric version. But why is it so cute?? It's light, the bags fit perfectly, and the pouch has compartments inside so it's super convenient! Cards and lipsticks would fit nicely too. Most importantly, it's just so cute and pretty 👍👍👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 예전에 다른 똥츄 케이스들은 고리 쪽이 부실해서 잘 떨어져나갔는데 바잇미는 고리 마감도 튼튼하고 안쪽 공간도 널널해서 똥봉투를 담아도 좋을 거 같아요. 무엇보다 너무 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en: I used other poop bag cases before, but the loops would break easily. BITE ME's loops are sturdy and the inside space is roomy, so it would be great for holding poop bags. Most of all, it's so adorable!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
사진이 좀 작아보이게 나왔는데 생각보다 넉넉해요~
똥봉지 하나 넣구 지폐랑 카드 넣으니까 딱 맞아요! 
귀여워서 고민없이 구매했는데 실물도 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The photos made it look a bit small, but it's actually more spacious than I thought~ I put in a poop bag and it fits perfectly with bills and cards! I bought it without hesitation because it's so cute, and the actual product is even cuter ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 일단 너무 귀여워서 산책 하면서 가지고 다니면 기분이 좋아질 것 같아서 구매해 봤어요 ㅎㅎㅎ배변봉투 자리 따로 있고 조그만한 소지품 넣는 공간 따로 있어서 활용도도 높을 것 같습니다!!ㅎㅎ너무 만족해용 여기서 판매하는 노란색 배변봉투도 너무 귀여워서 구매할까 생각중입니다 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's just so cute, and I think it'll brighten my mood during walks ㅎㅎㅎ There's a dedicated spot for poop bags and a separate compartment for small belongings, so it seems really practical!! ㅎㅎ I'm very satisfied, and I'm thinking about buying the yellow poop bags they sell here too because they're also so cute ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 생각보다 크기가 커요 간편하게 들고 다닐수 있어서 좋을거같아요 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: It's bigger than I thought, which is great because I can carry it around easily. It's really pretty!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 준비가 덜 되어 있는거 싫어하는 사람이다보니 …이것저것 주렁주렁 매달아봤어욬ㅋㅋ 평소에 풉백파우치가 플라스틱이다보니 덜그럭 덜그럭 거려서 너무 신경쓰여서 요런거 하나 구매해야지 해야지 하다가 드디어 ㅋㅋ 파우치 형태라 풉백 여유분도 하나 넣어놓고 같이 구매한 실리콘 물컵도 하나 넣어놓고 작은 휴대용티슈도 넣어놨어요! 넘 귀여움 :) 그리고 이전에 쓰던건 풉백 빼내다 보면 돌돌돌 주르륵 다 나와서 다시 집어넣고 그랬는데 요건 빡빡하게(?)나와서 풉백이 쉽게 풀리지 않아서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I'm someone who doesn't like being unprepared, so I've hung all sorts of things from it ㅋㅋ Usually poop bag pouches are plastic and they rattle around a lot, which bothered me, so I kept thinking I should buy something like this... and finally I did ㅋㅋ Since it's a pouch, I put an extra poop bag inside along with a silicone water cup I bought together, and a small travel tissue pack too! It's so cute :) Also, with my previous one, when I'd pull the poop bags out, they'd come rolling out all at once and I'd have to stuff them back in. But with this one, they come out nice and snug, so the bags don't come loose easily—I really like that!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 비숑 견주로써 비숑템은 정말 다 사고 사랑하는데요 이 또한 안살수가 없네요!! 넘모너무너무 귀여워요ㅜㅠㅠㅠ!! 안에는 센스있게 배변봉투랑 조그마한거 보관할 수 있는 공간까지 마련되어있네요🩷 손목 스트랩까지 완벽합니닷!!
reviews.content_en: As a Bichon owner, I love all Bichon products and I just had to get this one too!! It's SO incredibly cute ㅜㅠㅠㅠ!! Inside there's even a thoughtfully designed space for poop bags and small items to store 🩷 And it has a wrist strap too—perfect!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 울강쥐랑 닮았어요~~넘 귀엽고 가볍게 산책시 요것만 들고 다니기딱이네요 휴대용티슈랑 똥봉투 거뜬히들어갑니다~^^^
reviews.content_en: It looks like my pup~~ It's so cute and light, perfect to just carry this alone during walks! Fits travel tissues and poop bags easily~^^^

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽여요 .울 예쁜  강쥐랑 똑닮았어요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! It looks just like our adorable pup

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
천이라 가볍고 모양도 넘 귀여워요
비숑 키우는데 딱입니다~
reviews.content_en: It's lightweight since it's made of fabric and the design is so cute! Perfect for keeping a Bichon ♪

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
진짜 귀여워요
택배오자마자 뜯어서 배변봉투 담아봤어요
파우치 꺼낼때마다 기분좋아질거같은 귀여움뽀짝❤️
상품들 다 깨끗하구 허접한곳 없구 
취향저격 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's really cute! I opened it as soon as the package arrived and put poop bags in it right away. I'm going to feel so happy every time I pull out this pouch—such adorable charm❤️ Everything is clean and well-made with no cheap spots. Totally hits my taste ㅋ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
제가 가지고 싶어서 사버렸네요 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅜㅠ 지갑할까봐요.. 똥봉투 넣어두고 카드 넣고 다니려고 샀어요 
저희 두부랑 똑같이생겼네요! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 🥹🤭
reviews.content_en: I ended up buying it because I wanted one too! It's so cute ㅠㅜㅠ I'm thinking of using it as a wallet instead... I got it to keep poop bags and cards with me. It looks just like our Tofu! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 🥹🤭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요 우리 댕댕이 비숑인데 오묘하게 닮았어요:)
파우치 안쪽 2중칸이던데 에어팟도 넣어도 되겠어요 히히
재구매 예정....
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! Our pup is a Bichon and it looks mysteriously similar to her :) The pouch has a double compartment inside—I could even fit AirPods in there hehe. Already planning to repurchase....

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content: 제가 가지고 싶어서 구매했어요ㅋㅋ 산책할 때 강아지이동슬링백을 꼭  메고 나가는데 이런 파우치들이 유용하더라구요  너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I wanted it for myself ㅋㅋ I always wear a dog sling bag when I go for walks, and pouches like this are really useful! It's so cute

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
너무나 귀여운 풉백 파우치예요~
동전지갑 사이즈에 카드도 들어갈꺼 같아요~^^
넘 이뻐서 산책나갈때 마다 기분 😀좋아요~
reviews.content_en: It's such an adorably cute poodle-shaped pouch~! I think cards would fit in a coin purse-sized space too~^^ It's so pretty that I feel happy every time I go for a walk~

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
비슷하게 생긴 풉백♡
푸들아이인데 느낌이 비슷해서 너무 귀엽길래 픽!
가방에 달아 놓고 사용중입니다
완죤 만족♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: A similarly styled poodle pouch♡ I have a Poodle and the vibe is so similar that it's too cute—picked it! I'm using it attached to my bag. Completely satisfied♡♡♡

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
귀여워용 증말! ㅋㅋㅋ
앞으로도 자주들릴 바잇미 
바잇미 아이템 모두 좋아요!!!
생일전받을수 있어서 넘 행복해용
reviews.content_en: So cute!!! 😭 Can't wait to hear more from BITE ME going forward. I love all of the BITE ME items!!! So happy I got it before my birthday!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
풉파우치 사고 싶어서 장바구니에 한참 담아 두었다가 샀는데 진작에 살껄 그랬어요! 
귀엽고 가볍고 파우치 안도 공간도 있어서 간식도 넣어서 리쉬에 달아서 산책 갈때 한방에 다 챙겨갈 수 있어 가볍고 좋습니다. 
만족😆
reviews.content_en: I kept a poop pouch in my cart for a while before finally buying it, and I wish I'd gotten it sooner! It's adorable, lightweight, and has plenty of space inside. I can fit treats in it and attach it to the leash so I can grab everything in one go when we go for walks. Love it! 😆

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워요 ㅋㅋ도착하자마자 장난감인줄알고 흔들어제낄준비...
reviews.content_en: It's so cute lol 😂 The moment it arrived, my pup thought it was a toy and was ready to shake it around...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리 댕이는 자기 똑 닮은 똥추가 맘에 드는지 자꾸 
물어뜯으려고 해요..^_ㅠ 아까운 똥추 두개 날려묵고 애지중지 매번 숨겨서 가지고 다닙니다. 
똑같이 생겼죠!!! 귀여워요 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: My dog loves their poop bag that looks just like them, but keeps trying to chew it up 😭 Two poop bags have already been lost to their teeth, so now I hide it carefully and only bring it out when needed. They look identical!!! So cute!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워서 재입고 될때 바로 구매했습니다
reviews.content_en: It was so adorable that I bought it right away when it came back in stock.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
집에 풉백있는데 비숑풉백 너무 귀여워서 샀어요ㅋ
플라스틱썼는데 떨어뜨리면 시끄럽고 어떨땐 부러지고 그랬는데 이건 그런것도없고 가볍고 좋아요ㅋ
쪼금만 작았음 좋았을것같긴해요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I already have a poop pouch at home, but I loved the Bichon design so much I had to get it lol. I used to use a plastic one, but it would make noise when dropped and sometimes break. This one doesn't have those problems and it's lightweight! Though it would've been even better if it was a bit smaller lol

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀여워요!!
지퍼열면 봉투넣는 주머니랑 구분되어 있어서 좋아요.
안에 간식이든 간단한 비상금 챙겨서 다녀도 될 것 같아요! ㅡ
너무 이뻐서 계속 보게되는 파우치^.^!!
reviews.content_en: So so cute!! 💕 I love how the zipper opens to a separate pocket for waste bags. I could even carry some emergency cash or snacks inside! Such a pretty pouch that I keep looking at it 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 파란색 리쉬에 어울이는 풉백 찾다가 일단 비숑이라 장바구니바로 넣음,,^.^ 안에 칸도 나눠져잇어서 카드같은더 한두장 넣고 다니기 좋을거같아요 !!! 맘에 들어용
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a poop pouch to match my blue leash, and since it's a Bichon I just threw it in my cart right away 😆 It has compartments inside so I could easily carry a card or two. Love it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 파우치에 비숑 얼굴이 엄청 귀엽게 생긴 건 아니지만 이 나름대로의 매력도 있는 것 같아 구매하게 되었어요 :) 배변봉투만 넣을 수 있을 줄 알았는데 동전이나 지폐 같이 조그마난 것도 넣어다닐 수 있는 점도 좋았어용 단지 조금 아쉬운 건 줄이 너무 길어요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The Bichon face on the pouch isn't super detailed or anything, but it has its own charm so I decided to buy it :) I thought it could only hold poop bags, but I like that you can carry small things like coins and bills too. My only wish is that the strap was shorter 😩

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
퀄리티 재질이 좀.. 귀 부분 밖음질도 깔끔하진 않고요
실먼지가 자꾸 날려서 아쉽네요
그냥 귀여운 맛에 막 쓰기엔 좋을 것 같아요^^
근데 귀 모양은 랜덤으로 너무 막 달아놓은 느낌 ㅋㅋㅋ
가격에 비해 퀄리티를 좀 신경써주시면 어떨까 싶어요:)
잘 쓰겠습니다
reviews.content_en: The quality and material are a bit... The ear part has rough edges and isn't very neat. I'm disappointed because lint keeps coming off it. It's cute enough to use casually though 😊 But the ear placement looks pretty random haha. I think the quality could be better for the price :) Will still use it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
같은 비숑이라 구매했어요
속 안이 하나로 된 건 똥주머니 밖에 못 넣었는데 이건 속 안에 나눠져 있어 다른 것도 넣을 수 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I have the same breed of Bichon. The old one only had one compartment inside so I could only fit poop bags, but this one has divided sections so I can store other things too - love that!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 이쁘고 귀여워요. 똥비닐하고 아이팟이나 간식통 넣고 다니면 딱입니다. 실용성 예쁨 다 100점 입니다.
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty and cute! 😍 It's perfect for carrying poop bags, an iPod, and treat containers. Both practicality and aesthetics get 100 points from me.

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content: 플라스틱 똥츄 사용했는데 핸들링하면서 아이에게 부딪히는 일이 종종 생겨서 이걸로 바꾸게됐어요! 수납도 꽤나 넉넉하고 간식 넣고 다녀도 좋을 것 같고 무엇보다도 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: I used a plastic poop dispenser before, but it kept bumping into my pup while handling it, so I switched to this! The storage is pretty spacious, it'll be great for carrying treats too, and most importantly it's adorable 💕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
풉백 이것만 사용한다는💛미니물티슈 주머니에
잘 들어가요! 산책시 아주 편하고 주머니도 필요없음
할인많이 할때 놓쳐서 그래도 1만원대할인할때 쟁였👍🏻
추천! 추천!
reviews.content_en: My pup only uses POOP BACK 💛 The mini wet tissue pouch fits perfectly! Super convenient during walks and no need for a separate pouch. I missed the big sale, but still grabbed it when it was discounted to the 10,000 won range 👍🏻 Highly recommend! Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 세일할때 샀어요 너무이쁘네요~~
reviews.content_en: Bought it during the sale and it's so pretty! ~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
풉백 4개째사용중 미니물티슈 풉백 딱 잘 맞게 들어감
물티슈는 미니물티슈 사이즈면 딱!
미리 몇개 쟁여두고 쓰는중🐶🧡
최고! 최고!
reviews.content_en: Using my 4th POOP BACK now! The mini wet tissue fits perfectly. The wet tissues fit just right when it's the mini size! 🐶 I keep several stocked up and using them 🧡 The best! The best!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
안에 비닐 넣을 수 있는 칸 별도로 분리되서 좋구 비닐이랑 함께 티슈도 넣어다닐 수 있어서 좋아요
그래서 하나 샀다가 하나 더 샀어요
reviews.content_en: I like that there's a separate compartment for storing plastic bags inside, and I can carry tissues along with the bags too. That's why I bought one, then came back and bought another!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
저희집 풋백 도플갱어 개님에게 
검수 요청 통과해서 오늘 첫게시하러 갑니다!🤍
reviews.content_en: Sending this to our POOP BACK doppelgänger pup for inspection - it passed review so posting for the first time today! 🤍

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
예전에 브라운색 사서 잘 쓰고 있는데 전 말티즈견주라 비슷한
흰색도 구매했어요. 사이즈도  큼직해서 넉넉하게 들어가서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I bought the brown one before and I've been using it well, and since I have a Maltese, I also got the white one to match. The size is generous so everything fits in nicely!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
저희강아지랑 똑닮은 풉백 
너무귀엽고 생각보다 튼튼해요 
내부 수납이 나눠져잇어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Our pup looks just like this POOP BACK! 🐕 It's so cute and way more durable than I expected. I like that the interior storage is divided into sections 💕

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 비숑 반려하는 친구에게 선물했는데 너무 귀여워요~! 크기도 너무 크지 않아서 좋아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I got this as a gift for a friend who has a Bichon, and it's so cute~! The size is perfect too, not too big ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
풉백파우치인지 아무도모르게 귀여워요
안에도 작지않아서 간단하게 간식도 같이넣어다닐수있네요
reviews.content_en: It's adorable and nobody would even know it's a poop bag pouch 😄 The inside has plenty of space so I can easily carry some treats with me too

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
요건 그냥 진짜 완전 귀여워요!!
풉백 아니라 그냥 파우치로 가방에 달고다녀용!!
reviews.content_en: This is seriously just so cute!! I'm using it as a regular pouch and carrying it on my bag, not as a poop bag!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 완죤 귀여워요~~ 우리 공룡이 (비숑) 붕어빵이라 더더 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable~~ Our Dino (Bichon) looks like a taiyaki so I love it even more^^

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 바잇미 짱 ㅋㅋ 파우치 넘귀엽고 ㅋㅋ잘 사용하고 있습니다
reviews.content_en: BITE ME is the best ㅋㅋ The pouch is super cute ㅋㅋ and I'm using it well

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 귀엽네용 특가로 잘 샀어여
reviews.content_en: It's cute and I got a good deal on it 😊

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 저희집 아이와 완젼 판박이라 더 사랑스러워요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It looks just like our kid so it makes it even more lovable ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 공간도 넓고 카드도넣고 다닐수있어서 너무조아요
reviews.content_en: It has lots of space and I can carry cards in it too, so I love it so much

reviews.content: 저희 집 강아지랑 똑같이 생겨서 더 귀여워오😆
reviews.content_en: It looks exactly like our dog so it's even cuter 😆

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 풉백 너무너무 귀여워요...ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The poop bag pouch is so so cute...ㅠㅠㅠ
